query: SELECT ar.id, ar.status, ar.allocatedCount, ar.customerName, COUNT(CASE WHEN aro.status = 'unallocated' THEN 1 END) as unallocatedOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN aro.status = 'allocated' THEN 1 END) as stillAllocated FROM allocation_runs ar LEFT JOIN allocation_run_orders aro ON aro.runId = ar.id GROUP BY ar.id ORDER BY ar.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT ar.id, ar.status, ar.allocatedCount, ar.customerName, COUNT(CASE WHEN aro.status = 'unallocated' THEN 1 END) as unallocatedOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN aro.status = 'allocated' THEN 1 END) as stillAllocated FROM allocation_runs ar LEFT JOIN allocation_run_orders aro ON aro.runId = ar.id GROUP BY ar.id ORDER BY ar.id DESC LIMIT 10;
